message:
feat: add /help, /quit, /status commands; ctrl+c interrupts without quitting

- /help: lists all available commands
- /quit: clean exit (separate from interrupt)
- /status: shows session info with live context pressure
- ctrl+c: sends interrupt only; double-tap within 1s to quit
- Adds ContextManager.Pressure() and Session.ContextPressure() public APIs
- Server StatusInfo now includes context_pressure field
- Slash command parsing infrastructure with parseSlashCommand()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -126,6 +126,7 @@ func startEmbedded(ctx context.Context, cfg embeddedConfig) (*embeddedServer, er
 
 	srv := server.NewServer(server.ServerConfig{})
 	srv.SetCompactFunc(sess.Compact)
+	srv.SetContextPressureFunc(sess.ContextPressure)
 
 	// Bridge session events to SSE broadcaster.
 	go server.Bridge(srv, sess.Events())
